sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35871" key="e)nnomole/sxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννομολέσχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n35871.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prater about laws,</tr_> Timo <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
